visuals.title: SLR Parser Stack Operation (Shift)
visuals.description: Visual diagram for SLR Parser Stack Operation (Shift)
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Simple LR Parsing</text>

  <!-- Stack -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="60" height="180" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="80" y="45" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Stack
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Input Buffer -->
  <rect x="250" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="45" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Input Buffer
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Parsing Table -->
  <rect x="250" y="150" width="120" height="90" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="135" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Parsing Table
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Stack Elements -->
  <rect x="55" y="220" width="50" height="15" fill="#2196F3" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="80" y="232" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    $
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="55" y="200" width="50" height="15" fill="#2196F3" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="80" y="212" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    S
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Input Symbols -->
  <rect x="255" y="65" width="30" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="270" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    id
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="290" y="65" width="30" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="305" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    +
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="325" y="65" width="30" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="340" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    id
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="360" y="65" width="30" height="30" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="375" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    $
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Table Entries -->
  <rect x="255" y="155" width="50" height="20" fill="#2196F3" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="280" y="168" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    State 0
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="255" y="180" width="50" height="20" fill="#2196F3" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="280" y="193" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    State 1
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <rect x="255" y="205" width="50" height="20" fill="#2196F3" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="280" y="218" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    State 2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Action Arrows -->
  <path d="M120 120 L150 120 L150 80 L255 80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="185" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Shift/Reduce
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <path d="M310 110 L310 145" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="320" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Lookup
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
</svg>
